title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a framework for building and deploying multi-agent systems with features like sequential orchestration, self-correcting loops, context caching, and single-command deployment to Google's Agent Engine. The video demonstrates using ADK to automate enterprise M365 to Google Workspace migrations through a multi-agent architecture with specialized agents for parsing, research, and reporting.
